name: Beatrice Lillie
abstract: Beatrice Gladys Lillie, Lady Peel (29 May 1894 – 20 January 1989) was a Canadian-born British actress, singer and comedy performer. She began to perform as a child with her mother and sister.

about_quotes.speaker: William Randolph "Cozy" Cole
about_quotes.evidence: So Benny Goodman had the band at Seven Lively Arts, which the stars were Bea Lillie, Burt Lahr and Benny Goodman.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Norvo
about_quotes.evidence: I remember first time that was thrilling to me was that Bea Lillie and Reggie Gardiner was in a show
